description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests that runs on every push and pull request. The workflow consists of two jobs: Linting and Linux. The Linting job runs on ubuntu-latest, sets up Python 3.7, installs pre-commit, and runs linting checks on all files. The Linux job depends on Linting, runs on ubuntu-latest with a matrix of Python versions 3.6, 3.7, and 3.8, installs dependencies, and runs tests with pytest.
